speaker: MATT
raw_text: I want you to go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) How long have I been here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's nobody in the room, and you have no idea. You're underground in the workshop. You haven't seen the sun probably for a good day and a half.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: It's a new day. I didn't waste it at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have no idea quite how long you've been down here, and you've been left alone for quite some time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to head upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You go and open the metallic door that leads into your workshop and come around the corner, and there's a chair set in the corner, where Jarett would be sitting, one of the head guards at your facility. Jarett, however, is standing, hands up to his throat, going (choking sounds) with no visible assailant.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Help!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we there? No, we're not even there.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Jarett then gets up, sees this happening, moves over, and pulls out the key to try and open the prison door. Spends the turn doing so. Manages to get the door open. That's the end of Jarett's turn. Okay, now, the rest of you guys roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket. He can see Percy getting attacked and instinct takes over, and he runs forward and he claws him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, go ahead and roll for the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That does not hit. That's a natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That will hit! (laughs) It begins.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's the wrong thing. That's a 2d4.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So roll 2d4 and then multiply those by two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 17 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 damage, nice. Trinket runs up, coming out of his somewhat sleepy stupor, goes for a bite attack and grabs nothing with it, and turns around and rakes a claw backwards, manages to get the back of whatever this entity is, and you hear it scream (gasping scream). You do, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a technical dispute, really quickly. Could the wraith have gotten that far, since I knocked him prone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, it could've, because it uses half its movement speed to get up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, thank you. Never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Its movement is actually 50.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ignore me! 50?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not that you know that. But it moved far for what you think it should've been able to.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: By the way, for the record, Matthew, I have no idea what we're fighting.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nobody does.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm just saying, I haven't meta-gamed here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Congrats. (laughs) I'm proud of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fresh start.
